title: Gilberte de Courgenay
writer: Kurt Guggenheim, Rudolf Bolo Mäglin, Richard Schweizer
actors: Anne-Marie Blanc, Hélène Dalmet, Heinrich Gretler
plot: About the daughter of the couple who ran the Hôtel de la Gare de Courgenay, in the Canton of Jura. In 1915, the composer Hanns In der Gand was staying in the region and in 1917 he composed La Petite Gilberte, immortalizing the you...
